name: link_isasian_chinese
input_html: 我想了解投资基金的收益情况。
expected_html: 我想了解投资基金的收益情况。
notes: isAsian link injection with real Chinese text. The keyword 投资基金 appears between CJK characters and must be wrapped in <a href='/funds' data-seojuice-cs='501'>. Verifies the corrected \p{Script=Han}/\p{Script=Hiragana}/\p{Script=Katakana} regex works (the old bare \p{Han} form threw a SyntaxError and fail-opened the whole pipeline). Title is also injected.
